name: Madame Wu's Chinese Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 wonton wrappers cut into 1/8 inch strips
1/2 cup thinly sliced green onions (white parts only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok. The oil is ready when strands of noodles rise to the surface immediately.
2. Drop wonton strips into hot oil and fry until light brown. Remove and drain on paper towels. Set aside.
3. Divide noodles into three parts and deep fry separately. Remove from hot oil as soon as noodles float to the surface. Drain on paper towels. Set aside.
4. Deep fry chicken pieces for 5 minutes. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels. Cool.
5. Cut into strips. Set aside.
6. Place cooked chicken meat in a large salad bowl.
7. Add mustard, sesame oil, soy sauce, almonds, green onions, and salt. Mix well.
8. Add fried wonton strips and noodles. Mix well.
9. Pile the salad over lettuce. Do not toss or the salad will become soggy.
